corporal is a unit that you need to set up right to do huge damage

Inferno. A General Support/Aliemus Battery/Poison Carry. General Support at E1/OE. Poison Carry at E3/OE.

Clem. Keyflare Gen/% Dmg Amp or Cut/Heal/Sub-DPS, as a Support. Usable at E0. E1 is QoL. E2 is Sub-Dps. E3 is Support and Dps Capabilities Amp.

Corposant. DPS/Sub-Dps/Survival. Helps you survive a ton and creates amazing burst turn at specific Enlightenments. E2 For Survival. E3 for Burst Turn. OE for even bigger Burst Turn.

Castor. DPS/Support/Survival. Support/Survival at E0. Shield(Exalts) alot more with E2. Becomes DPS at E3. OE makes him a solo hypercarry.

Doreslain. Nuker. E3 is desired, but won’t change much(other then more DMG straightup) compared to E0. He’s a either you overkill or never kill.

Kath. Survival/DPS. Requires E3. Becomes a Tank/DPS/Nuker at E3. Can solo hypercarry.

Pickman. Versatile Support. Kit viable at E0 and further Enlightenments just make him even better. Normally wants to be paired with Nuke Exalts, or Multi Hit Awakeners.

Pollux. Requires E3. At E3, becomes a Nuker w/ proper setup. At OE, he can Nuke the World. With Setup, and with other Awakeners, he can become a Fortress as well.
Little TLDR paragraphs. Whichever one catches you’re eye, tell me, and I can give you further details.

Gramona is used mainly in two teams. A Kathigu-Ra team, or a Mono Chaos team. There is a forbidden third DPS version, but it’s alot of invest(ironic when I included Mono Chaos). Kath team would look like Kath/Gramona/Karen/Ryker. Tawil team would look like Tawil/Gramona/Hameln/Ryker(Karen). Kath being the cheapest team with a Gramona. Tawil the most expensive endgame version with a Gramona.

Inferno is used mainly in two teams. Aequor Tawil and Poison 24. Tawil would be OE Inferno/Tawil/Hameln Caecus. 24 Poison would be 24/Miryam/Lily/Inferno. At OE, Inferno can be used as a general support for any team as well. All three choices kind of want OE Inferno, expensive.

Tawil can be mixed with any realm, taking on a DPS or Support role. In Mono Chaos, Tawil is a DPS with the setup of Hameln/Tawil/Karen/Ryker. Infinite Cycle Expensive Team. In Aequor Tawil, Tawil is a DPS with Tawil/Hamlen/Caecus(Celeste)/Flex Slot. Not that expensive to run. In Caro Tawil, she is a Support mainly run with Pickman for a “Discover” mechanic used for Pickman’s 4 cost. In Ultra, Tawil is a Support that is used as a replacement for Horla, or ran with “weird” team comps such as Jenkins. With further usage of pulling Casiah Cards from Exalt.

You definitely have a lot of really good units, that's for sure. I think you have many units that certainly would benefit a lot from some enlightens. I think where you go from here really depends on what teams you like the most and where you would feel the happiest investing. for example thais and ghelot would both benefit a lot from increasing their enlighten levels a bit, but if you really just don't enjoy playing caro teams, then it's probably not gonna feel good to invest extra into them. From your list, the units I see that I think are good units that also would benefit from getting at least one more copy would be hameln, lily, ghelot, thais, pickman, clem, and castor. 

If, however, you are happy with those units already and don't feel the need to boost them up any more, and are really in love with Tawil/GDoll, both of those units are extremely strong, and will very likely be relevant for a long time, so boosting them to OE would definitely give them extra strength and be relevant for you in the long run. 

General wisdom would say to work on other key englightens first, but if you feel like chasing an OE for one of those two is what would make you have more fun, then go for that. You're not really shooting yourself in the foot that bad either way imo
